layout.layout_rhythm: retro-zine: medium density, medium-low formality. Beige paper with green accent and Bebas Neue + Caveat: a riso-printed zine in HTML form.
layout.spacing_rhythm: Reuse source spacing tokens and grid gaps: {"slide_pad": "60px", "slide_pad_wide": "60px 80px", "card_pad_lg": "48px", "card_pad_md": "32px", "card_pad_sm": "24px", "gap_lg": "60px", "gap_md": "40px", "gap_sm": "24px"}

template_json_typography.style: tall condensed display + handwritten script + clean grotesk body; layered like a printed zine page

design_tokens_typography.style: tall condensed display + handwritten script + clean grotesk body; layered like a printed zine page

typography.typography_role: tall condensed display + handwritten script + clean grotesk body; layered like a printed zine page

cjk_policy.known_degradation: The system's three-face contrast (Bebas display + Space Grotesk body + Caveat hand-script) is a Latin-typographic argument; collapsing it to a single CJK serif loses one rhythm and gains another. The decision to use a serif (Noto Serif SC) rather than a sans (Noto Sans SC) is deliberate — the zine's mid-century printed-press lineage maps better to Chinese se

template_json_palette.description: warm beige / khaki paper with one saturated forest green; dark ink and off-white cream; reads like a two-color riso print

visual_effects.notes: Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: tinted_card.

image.strategy: Preserve source image regions and screenshot-backed composition; runtime generation must use traceable online/approved image assets, not local decorative placeholders.

font_and_typography_constraints: distinctive display face may be approximated by Slide/Source/思源 fonts; preserve weight/size/case first
italic is source-aware but CJK fake italic is forbidden; use color/weight fallback when unavailable
letter spacing is preserved for Latin labels and reset/softened for CJK

extraction_receipt.claim_boundary: visual contract only; not a renderer implementation or fidelity pass

display.mapping_reason: 保留 Bebas Neue 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

body.mapping_reason: 保留 Space Grotesk 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

label.mapping_reason: 保留 JetBrains Mono 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Code Pro 与 思源等宽。

metric.mapping_reason: 保留 JetBrains Mono 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Code Pro 与 思源等宽。

font_strategy.mapping_reason: 根据 design.md/template.html/template.json 中的 font-family 与 typography token 提取源字体；运行时按 Slide/系统/Adobe/思源可用字体降级。

text_transform_policy.raw_value: no uppercase on CJK - Full-width punctuation - No period on display headlines - Pangu spacing (盘古之白): `使用 Claude` not `使用Claude` - One font per sentence ### Aesthetic Notes for This System - **The 0.02–0.04em positive tracking that defines Bebas display must drop to 0** on CJK. Tracked Chinese characters look broken — the spacing visually divides each character into a separate word. The compression-and-tracking signature of Bebas does not transfer; uppercase

line_height_scale.raw_value: tight on display (0.85–1.1), generous on body (1.6–1.7), loose on hand-script (1.3). Never invert these — tight body and loose display both break the rhythm. ## Layout ### Canvas System The system targets `100vw × 100vh` — full viewport. Each `.slide` is absolutely positioned to fill the viewport; body 1.75–1.85, display 1.15–1.25 - Letter-spacing: 0 on CJK - Text-transform: no uppercase on CJK - Full-width punctuation - No period on display headlines - Pangu spacing (盘古之白): `使用 Claude` not `使用C

italic.source_usage: source uses italic/font-style or italic-family tokens
italic.fallback_when_unavailable: use color_shift or weight_shift; do not fake CJK italic
italic.loss_notes: Satori/Slide may not provide exact Google italic face; record as visual approximation.

underline.source_usage: source uses underline/text-decoration or hairline emphasis
underline.mapped_decoration: native underline only for actual text-decoration source usage
underline.fallback_shape: 1px-3px rule or border accent when underline font rendering is unavailable

line_through.source_usage: not present in source; default no line-through

emphasis.color_shift: use source accent color roles only
emphasis.font_family_switch: only switch between mapped display/body/label/metric roles from this family
emphasis.weight_shift: increase one role step within font_weight_scale
emphasis.style_shift: italic only when source_usage requires and CJK fallback is safe

italic.raw_value: uman-hand voice against the otherwise typeset system. There is no fourth face. Italic does not exist (Caveat is a script face, not an italic). Underline does not exist. Emphasis is achieved by switching face (Space Grotesk body → Caveat hand-script for a personal note, Bebas Neue display for a call
